<model > <extendSimpleProperty name="httpCode" label="请求code" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="httpmsg" label="http返回信息" type="String" length="200" />
<extendElementProperty name="applicantName" label="申请人1" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3434463ea257a2" label="申请日期" type="Date" formula="true" defaultValue="DateTimeFunction.getNow()" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_34344661751578" label="申请部门" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3434466fb1f59e" label="联系电话" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_xfgs" label="销方公司" enumValues="上电|1500" type="String" defaultValue="1500" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c01e3fde0d9ce" label="业务类型" notNull="true" enumValues="备品备件类|1;非备品备件类|2" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_way" label="开票方式" notNull="true" enumValues="单张开票|11;模版导入|22" type="Double" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="receiptType" label="发票类型" notNull="true" enumValues="电子发票（增值税专用发票）|81;电子发票（普通发票）|82" type="Double" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_34ae00c8bcd4be" label="是否确认收入" notNull="true" enumValues="确认销售收入不开票|1;确认销售收入并开票|3;预收款开票|4" type="Double" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3434500fd88ebe" label="其他情况说明" type="String" length="undefined" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="buyerCompanyName" label="纳税人名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="buyerTaxNo" label="纳税人识别号" type="String" length="18" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="detailList" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="spbm" label="商品税收编码" notNull="true" enumValues="发电机|1090401010000000000;电动机|1090403010000000000;发电机组|1090402010000000000;电动机零件|1090403070000000000;劳务|2020000000000000000;仓储服务（6%）|3040407020000000000;金属制品|1080412010000000000;其他咨询服务（6%）|3040603990000000000;企业管理服务（园区服务费）|3040801010000000000;经营租赁（含租金5%）|3040502020400000000;其他机械设备|1099900000000000000;黑色金属冶炼压延品|1080207070000000000;供电|1100101020200000000;水冰雪|1100301010000000000;电信服务6%|3030299000000000000" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="spmc" label="商品名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="groupIndex" label="流水号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="ggxh" label="规格型号(限18位)" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="dw" label="单位" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="spsl" label="数量" type="Double" length="10" scale="6" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="sfhs" label="含税" enumValues="是|1;否|0" type="String" defaultValue="1" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="dj" label="计算单价" type="Double" defaultValue="0" scale="6" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="je" label="金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="slv" label="税率" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_343454314c4bfc" label="金额合计（大写）" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_343b484d4eb952" label="总和" type="Double" formula="true" defaultValue="$列表.求总和$($detailList.je$)" recalculateOnSave="true" scale="2" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="remarks" label="发票备注" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="invoiceUrl" label="查看发票url" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="wayTemp" label="开票方式（辅助）" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="receiptTypeTemp" label="发票类型(辅助)" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" />
</model>

<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_343454314c4bfc" label="金额合计（大写）" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_343b484d4eb952" label="总和" type="Double" formula="true" defaultValue="$列表.求总和$($detailList.je$)" scale="2" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="remarks" label="备注" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="invoiceUrl" label="查看发票url" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="wayTemp" label="开票方式（辅助）" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="receiptTypeTemp" label="发票类型(辅助)" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" />
</model>

<extendSimpleProperty name="buyerCompanyName" label="纳税人名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="buyerTaxNo" label="纳税人识别号" type="String" length="18" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="detailList" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="spbm" label="商品税收编码/税率" notNull="true" enumValues="发电机--13%|1090401010000000000;电动机--13%|1090403010000000000;发电机组--13%|1090402010000000000;电动机零件--13%|1090403070000000000;劳务--13%|2020000000000000000;金属制品--13%|1080412010000000000;其他机械设备--13%|1099900000000000000;黑色金属冶炼压延品--13%|1080207070000000000;供电--13%|1100101020200000000;其他咨询服务--6%|3040603990000000000;企业管理服务--6%|3040801010000000000;仓储服务--6%|3040407020000000000;电信服务--6%|3030299000000000000;经营租赁--9%（含租金5%）|3040502020400000000;水冰雪--9%|1100301010000000000;信息技术服务--6%|3040201040000000000" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="spmc" label="商品名称" type="String" length="70" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="groupIndex" label="流水号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="ggxh" label="规格型号" type="String" length="36" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="dw" label="单位" type="String" length="15" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="spsl" label="数量" type="BigDecimal" length="16" scale="13" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="sfhs" label="含税" enumValues="是|1;否|0" type="String" defaultValue="1" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="slv" label="税率" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" defaultValue="0.1" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="dj" label="计算单价" type="BigDecimal" defaultValue="0" scale="13" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="je" label="金额" type="BigDecimal" length="16" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="zzstsgl" label="税收优惠" enumValues="零税率|零税率;不征税|不征税;免税|免税;按3%简易征收|按3%简易征收;按5%简易征收|按5%简易征收;减按1.5%计征|按5%简易征收减按1.5%计征" type="String" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_343454314c4bfc" label="金额合计（大写）" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_343b484d4eb952" label="总和" type="BigDecimal" formula="true" defaultValue="$列表.求总和$($detailList.je$)" recalculateOnSave="true" scale="2" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="remarks" label="发票备注" type="String" length="400" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="invoiceUrl" label="查看发票url" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="wayTemp" label="开票方式（辅助）" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="receiptTypeTemp" label="发票类型(辅助)" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" />
</model>
